EmailTemplate.name: Password Reset Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Password Reset Request
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Receiving_User.FirstName},
You recently requested to reset your password for your Insolvency Stream account. Click the link below to reset it:
{!Community_Url}
If you did not request a password reset, please disregard this email or reply to let us know. This password reset link is only valid for the next 24 hours.
If you are having trouble with the password reset link, copy and paste the above URL into your web browser.
